changelog: v1.1.0 — Law-enforcement jobs can no longer rob peds. New Config.Police.blockPoliceFromRobbing toggle (default on) reuses the existing Config.Police.jobs list; the 'Rob Civilian' target is hidden client-side and the server authoritatively refuses the robbery, regardless of duty status. v1.0.4 — Feeds distortionz_cad: the police alert now also raises a live CAD dispatch call (code 10-90, priority 2) at the robbery coords. Guarded by resource state — no-op if the CAD isn't running. v1.0.3 — README + GitHub metadata. v1.0.2 — protected-ped support (no rob option on script peds; respects isShopKeeper/invincible/protected). v1.0.1 — Initial release.
